span.p:
领域标准
学会读懂和建模规则

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
S1000D, DMC, BREX, SNS,
ICN, PM assembly,
ATA/iSpec, S2000M, MIL, DITA

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
数据库与索引
系统依赖的持久化能力

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PostgreSQL: metadata/audit
Object store: raw artifacts
RDF store: triples/SPARQL
OpenSearch/Tantivy: BM25
Qdrant: HNSW vectors
FAISS: IVF/PQ/GPU experiments

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
底层模型能力
模型调用、表示和推理加速

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
HuggingFace, embeddings,
rerankers, ColBERT,
vLLM/TGI, PagedAttention,
ONNX, TensorRT-LLM

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
需要调优的操作
用评估指标驱动参数选择

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
chunk size/overlap
BM25 analyzer/field boost
HNSW M/efSearch
IVF nlist/nprobe, PQ bytes
RRF k, rerank topN
HyDE prompt/context budget
vLLM batching/cache settings

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
开发过程中的选型
框架只服务于可验证目标

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FastAPI: API
Pydantic: schemas
LangGraph: agents
LlamaIndex/Haystack: RAG comparison
DSPy: prompt/retrieval optimization
Rust/PyO3: optional hot path

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
评估与证明
决定能不能写进简历

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Recall@k, MRR, nDCG
citation coverage
groundedness
compliance precision/recall
latency/throughput
audit traces
